query_title: The Gods Must Be Crazy II

recommendations.title: Horizon Line
recommendations.overview: A couple flying on a small plane to attend a tropical island wedding must fight for their lives after their pilot suffers a heart attack.

recommendations.title: On a Wing and a Prayer
recommendations.overview: After their pilot dies unexpectedly mid-flight, passenger Doug White must safely land a plane and save his entire family from insurmountable danger.

recommendations.title: Lift
recommendations.overview: An international heist crew, led by Cyrus Whitaker, race to lift $500 million in gold from a passenger plane at 40,000 feet.

recommendations.title: Me Against You: Mr. S's Vendetta
recommendations.overview: A young couple who makes popular YouTube videos for children sets out to win an award, but an evil mastermind stands in the way of their success.

recommendations.title: The Flyboys
recommendations.overview: Two boys from a small town find their courage tested when they accidentally stow away aboard an airplane owned by the mob...

recommendations.title: Fight or Flight
recommendations.overview: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking down a target on a plane but must protect that target when they're surrounded by people trying to kill both of them.

recommendations.title: The Party 2
recommendations.overview: A young French teenage girl after moving to a new city falls in love with a boy and is thinking of having sex with him because her girlfriends have already done it.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A young couple on a motorway journey are drawn into a game of cat and mouse with a truck driver when they see something disturbing in the back of his vehicle.

recommendations.title: Against the Sun
recommendations.overview: A WWII pilot, bombardier, and radioman find themselves adrift on a lifeboat without food or water after being forced to ditch their plane during a scouting mission.

recommendations.title: Revolutionary Road
recommendations.overview: A young couple living in a Connecticut suburb during the mid-1950s struggle to come to terms with their personal problems while trying to raise their two children. Based on a novel by Richard Yates.
